title: Cozy Bed Sitter in Owa-Alero
description: A well-furnished bed sitter perfect for a student. Close to the university gate.
content: This bed sitter is located just 5 minutes walk from the university main gate. It includes a kitchenette and a modern bathroom. Very secure environment.

title: Spacious Single Room in Alihame
description: A large single room in a fenced compound. Constant water supply and good security.
content: This single room is situated in a quiet and serene environment in Alihame. The compound is fenced and has a security gate. It has a separate kitchen area.

title: Modern Room and Parlor in Owo-Yibo
description: A tastefully finished room and parlor apartment. Ideal for students who need more space.
content: This room and parlor apartment is newly built and well finished. Located in a story building in Owo-Yibo. Has a full kitchen, bathroom and toilet en-suite.

title: Affordable Bed Sitter in Alihame
description: Budget-friendly bed sitter for students. Clean and secure.
content: This affordable bed sitter is perfect for a student on a budget. It is clean, secure and has good ventilation. Located close to shops and eateries.

title: Single Room in Owa-Alero Fenced Compound
description: Clean single room in a well secured fenced compound. Water and light available.
content: This single room is located in a fenced compound with 24/7 security. Constant electricity and water supply. Very close to the faculty of engineering.

title: Room and Parlor in Owa-Alero
description: Spacious room and parlor in a bungalow. Perfect for final year students.
content: This room and parlor is located in a quiet bungalow in Owa-Alero. It comes furnished with a sofa set, dining table and a bed. Very close to the university library.
